summary.lv: CV-Online Recruitment (Cembra Latvia) meklē Document/Template Developer, kurš izstrādās un uzturēs dokumentu veidnes OMS/CCM vidē, strādājot ar XML, XSLT un AFP tehnoloģijām. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €5000–7000 mēnesī.
summary.en: CV-Online Recruitment is hiring a Document/Template Developer for Cembra Latvia to build and maintain document templates in an OMS/CCM environment using XML, XSLT, and PDF/AFP technologies, in a hybrid role in Riga offering €5,000–7,000/month.
